scripts.produck:baseline: npm exec --package=@produck/agent-toolkit@latest -- agent-toolkit enforce-node-baseline --cwd . && npm run produck:install
scripts.produck:commit:check: npm run produck:format && npm run produck:lint
scripts.produck:publish: npm run produck:publish:check && npm run publish --
scripts.produck:publish:check: npm run produck:install && npm run produck:coverage && npm run produck:commit:check
scripts.publish: npm run produck:lint && npm run test && lerna publish --no-private
